  as={"h1"}

  children={"Copy file from one folder to another"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v2/Drive/Folders/{folderId}/{fileId}/Copy"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>
